description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a polygonal, slightly tapered body and a flat, closed top. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each displaying a rich brown color with darker wood grain streaks, and is reinforced by two thick, dark gray metal hoops encircling the upper and lower thirds of the barrel. The barrel sits on a square patch of green ground, with tufts of stylized grass at its base, suggesting an outdoor setting. Two thin, stick-like rods protrude from one side, possibly representing handles or tools resting against the barrel. The surface of the wood appears matte and slightly rough, while the metal bands are smoother and subtly reflective. No visible labels or markings are present, and the top is fully enclosed, indicating the barrel is not currently open.
description: A polygonal wooden barrel with dark metal hoops, closed top, and two thin rods protruding from one side, set on a grassy patch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's wooden staves, metal hoops, and two thin rods extending from the right side, with grass at the base.
description_view_1: This side view reveals two thin rods or handles attached to the left, with the metal hoops and wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the closed top, metal hoops, and a prominent green grass tuft at the base, with rods extending from the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a clean barrel surface with no rods or handles visible, emphasizing the wood and metal construction.
